goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and 'doesn't need to include internet'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'british' food and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and doesn't need to include internet
Make sure you get star of the hotel and phone number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve british food and should be in the centre
